programme.title: Open

programme.title: First Love

programme.desc: Water is the lifeblood of all civilisations. In Iran, the water is drying up. The result is a slow-moving environmental emergency now pressing into politics, daily life, and the stability of the regime itself.

programme.title: Art Works

programme.desc: Host Shaun Micallef travels to China with comedian Aaron Chen as he embarks on a mission to understand the rich heritage of Aaron's father, and the generations before him.

programme.title: Secret Window
programme.desc: A successful writer in the midst of a painful divorce is stalked at his remote lake house by a would-be scribe who accuses him of plagiarism.

programme.title: The Contenders 26 - EP 38
programme.desc: Korea Republic cruised through AFC Asian Qualifiers but Saudi Arabia were made to toil on the Road to 26.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal - EP 1
programme.desc: MY BEST FRIEND'S AN ANIMAL is an emotive, heart-warming series which tells the stories of humans who have unlikely and extraordinary friendships with wild animals. Featuring 6 compelling stories per episode and filmed all over the world. The series proves that when it comes to friendship, shape, size, or even species is irrelevant. Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surprising places.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 12
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood Eats Japan - EP 1
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood has never been to Japan. As far as he's concerned, it's a land without bread - and a land without bread, is a land without bakers. This three-part series sees Britain's favourite baker discover just how wrong he was - and how Japan is fast becoming one of the world's top foodie destinations. Across the series, Paul travels the country sampling regional delicacies and gets taught some of Japan's most famous dishes.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood Eats Japan - EP 2
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood has never been to Japan. As far as he's concerned, it's a land without bread - and a land without bread, is a land without bakers. Across the series, Paul travels the country sampling regional delicacies and gets taught some of Japan's most famous dishes.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: Kin - EP 383
programme.desc: The Bala children set up a dating app account for Kenneth and enlist the help of Ajay to take him out to meet women. Zara is forced to deal with her grief over her stillborn after an encounter with a friend's baby.

programme.title: The Contenders 26 - EP 35
programme.desc: When Turkey finished third at the 2002 World Cup, few would have believed it would be almost a quarter of a century before their side’s next appearance at the tournament.

programme.title: Ainsley's Fantastic Flavours S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Join Britain’s happiest chef, Chef Ainsley HarriottJ, as he criss-crosses the UK in search of deserving occasions, and then whips up delicious dishes worthy of a celebration.

programme.title: Unbeatable - EP 9
programme.desc: Some answers are good, but only one is UNBEATABLE in this knock-out quiz tournament where contestants could win up to 10,000.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 164
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Moneyball S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Ian Wright presents the game show where the difference between winning life-changing money and going home with nothing rests entirely on the roll of a ball.

programme.desc: Luke Nguyen’s India takes viewers on a journey of the senses through India where food, religion, and rich culture go hand in hand. In the brand new series, Luke circumnavigates Southern India discovering the cuisines, sounds, and colours of this captivating region.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Veggie Island - EP 3
programme.desc: This program introduces vegetarian restaurants from all across Taiwan. Featured restaurants include fine dining restaurants, casual dining, all-you-can-eat buffets, dim sum, international fusion cuisine, Buddhist temple food, dessert shops, and vegetarian food workshops.

programme.title: Elsbeth S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Astute but unconventional attorney Elsbeth Tascioni returns to solve more cases alongside the NYPD.

programme.title: Murder in a Small Town S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: At a fundraiser for her arts center, Cassandra reunites with a childhood friend who later discovers that her husband has gone missing and that a crime scene has unfolded in her home. Cassandra shares clues with Alberg as he investigates the mysterious disappearance, unveiling secrets and the truth behind a marriage.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen’s India - EP 1
programme.desc: Luke Nguyen’s India takes viewers on a journey of the senses through India where food, religion, and rich culture go hand in hand. In the brand new series, Luke circumnavigates Southern India discovering the cuisines, sounds, and colours of this captivating region.

programme.title: SHERO - EP 15
programme.desc: A photo of Ruixiang is found in Mercy's phone Junsheng suspects Ruixiang is somewhat related to the mastermind. Yinchen realizes Junsheng has feelings for Yinxi and encourages him to woo her. Yinxi could not recall who could have wanted her dead. Gina hires SHERO's protection to go to her flour factory in Malaysia there, the bodyguards discover her true identity...

programme.title: SHERO - EP 16
programme.desc: Gina is killed by a masked man. Yinxi remembers Mercy saying that the mastermind is someone from RSB, and thinks that it is Ruixiang, putting Yinchen in a spot. Ruixiang suspects that his family is involved in illegal dealings, but his parents deny it. Code confesses to Xinya again but is rejected, Jingyu comforts him. Looking through the RC folder, Yinxi recalls more crucial moments...

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 19 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 20 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 7 警徽天职之海岸卫队
programme.desc: Man Ting realizes that Yun Yun is missing after receiving a call from Ah Ping. While searching for Yun Yun with Jia Ming, Man Ting has an anxiety attack when Yun Yun's disappearance reminded her of her own traumatic experience. Seeing Man Ting in such a state for the first time, Jia Ming comforts her by embracing her.

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 8 警徽天职之海岸卫队
programme.desc: Man Ting and Jia Ming coincidentally return to the same park where they were abducted from to look for clues. They hear a child's cry and search for the source of the sound. Seeing a man with a little girl, Man Ting misunderstands the man for abducting the girl and rushes to stop him. Witnessing Man Ting's reaction, Jia Ming confirms that she is the girl who was abducted with him when they were little.

programme.title: King Of Culinary - EP 8 三把刀1
programme.desc: King of Culinary is a brand new cooking competition, in arena style! Uncovering the hidden culinary talents, and pitting them against top local chefs for a cook-off. These talents could be teachers, lawyers, designers with a day job, but when they get home, they turn into highly-skilled chefs in their own kitchen. In every episode for a total of 13 weeks, the culinary talent challenges three celebrity chefs in three different rounds. Who will emerge as the final winner?

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 15 前线追踪
programme.desc: He has never married. She has also chosen to remain single. Why are more Singaporeans choosing singlehood? And how could this reshape Singapore's future?

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 10 至死不渝
programme.desc: Shuheng wants to date Manning, upsetting Keying as she realizes her feelings for him. At CCMS, Hongtao reveals a third person was at the crime scene. Keying is stunned as she recalls seeing Hongtao outside the room during her discussion with Shuheng. David mentions he once saw Andrew at the hotel. While talking, they spot Andrew trying to flee. Just as Andrew attacks Keying, David protects her

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 74 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 18 麻雀乐团
programme.desc: Xiao Cheng's first rehearsal with the Harbour Orchestra is disappointing because the musicians perform inconsistently and fail to meet expectations. Zhang Tie devises a plan that helps Situ Jiu force his rivals to stop giving out red packets to attract customers.

programme.title: Focus - EP 15 焦点
programme.desc: Dear You evokes memories of home. Over 800 Qiaopi reveal the hopes and sacrifices of migrants who helped shape Singapore’s founding years. The Strait of Hormuz has reopened, but underwater mines remain a threat, turning mine clearance into a test of security and diplomacy.

programme.title: 100% Wife - EP 62 金家好媳妇
programme.desc: Shuyun tells Zhilin that she is not biologically related to Youcai. Qiuyi and Guanting dance in the nightclub and are secretly filmed when Guanting tries to help Qiuyi from fainting.

programme.title: 100% Wife - EP 63 金家好媳妇
programme.desc: Guanda takes Yanjun to the church while Zhilin waits for him in a bridal gown. Yanjun and Zhilin marry with the blessing of Guanda and others. Qiuyi deliberately sabotage Guanting's gift, causing Xinrong to think that Guanting is having an affair.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 313

Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol and Mirtoselect—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision.

He strives for a human connection and reminisces about his parents' loving relationship.

Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重
